description: Most craft breweries. For example Samuel Adams is still considered a micro brewery.
An extremely small brewery which typically only distributes locally.
A regional location of an expanded brewery (e.g., Sierra Nevada in Asheville).
A beer-focused restaurant or restaurant/bar with a brewery on premises.
A very large brewery. Likely not for visitors. Megabreweries like AB-InBev.
A brewery in planning or not yet opened.
A bar. Brewery is unknown or unverified.
A brewery that uses another brewery's equipment.
A brewery that operates out of an existing brewery.
A location which has been closed.
